name: Izo
effect_text: [On Play] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.[On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card from your hand: If your Leader has the [Land of Wano] or [Whitebeard Pirates] type, give up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards -2000 power during this turn.
